summary: A Newsmax LIVE remote interview with Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer speaking about the Project Firewall enforcement initiative and H-1B and visa matters, with Newsmax chyrons ('LABOR DEPT. INVESTIGATES VISA ABUSE').
notable_text: NEWSMAX; Lori Chavez-DeRemer, Secretary of Labor; LABOR DEPT. INVESTIGATES VISA ABUSE
